waveform_panel_diagram: The image shows stacked labeled sinusoidal waveform panels on a shared horizontal scale.
The diagram shows labeled waveform panels with visible midlines and shared horizontal span.
This figure shows several labeled sinusoidal waveforms arranged in panels.
The visual shows labeled waveform panels for comparing wave properties.
The waveform diagram shows labeled panels drawn on the same horizontal scale.

wave_property_extremum_label_query: Choose the labeled waveform panel requested below.
Select the panel that matches the requested wave comparison.
Use the labeled waveform panels to answer the comparison question.
Compare the displayed waveforms and choose the correct panel label.
Identify the waveform panel that satisfies the requested property.

highest_amplitude_label: Which labeled waveform panel has the highest amplitude?
Compare the vertical size of the waves. Which panel has the greatest amplitude?
Which panel shows the largest wave amplitude?
Choose the panel with the tallest wave from midline to crest.
Which labeled waveform has the greatest vertical displacement from its midline?
lowest_amplitude_label: Which labeled waveform panel has the lowest amplitude?
Compare the vertical size of the waves. Which panel has the smallest amplitude?
Which panel shows the smallest wave amplitude?
Choose the panel with the shortest wave from midline to crest.
Which labeled waveform has the least vertical displacement from its midline?
highest_frequency_label: Which labeled waveform panel has the highest frequency?
Compare the number of cycles across the shared horizontal scale. Which panel has the greatest frequency?
Which panel shows the most wave cycles?
Choose the waveform with the highest frequency.
Which labeled panel packs the most cycles into the same horizontal span?
lowest_frequency_label: Which labeled waveform panel has the lowest frequency?
Compare the number of cycles across the shared horizontal scale. Which panel has the lowest frequency?
Which panel shows the fewest wave cycles?
Choose the waveform with the lowest frequency.
Which labeled panel has the fewest cycles over the same horizontal span?
longest_wavelength_label: Which labeled waveform panel has the longest wavelength?
Using the shared horizontal scale, which panel has the longest wavelength?
Which panel shows the largest distance between matching wave crests?
Choose the waveform with the longest wavelength.
Which labeled panel has the widest spacing between cycles?
shortest_wavelength_label: Which labeled waveform panel has the shortest wavelength?
Using the shared horizontal scale, which panel has the shortest wavelength?
Which panel shows the smallest distance between matching wave crests?
Choose the waveform with the shortest wavelength.
Which labeled panel has the tightest spacing between cycles?
